name: zutil_zrdr_free_path_list
description: zUtil_ZRDR_FreePathList frees every search-path payload from the supplied list, or the scratch search-path list when the argument is null.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zUtil_ZRDR_FreePathList: 29 unmasked mismatches after masking 16 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 51 bytes and the VC object body is 48 bytes.

The reviewed byte drift is loop/control-flow shape around pop-front payload cleanup and the null-list scratch fallback; the native smoke verifies replacement cleanup through zUtil_ZRDR_SetSearchPath and explicit cleanup of the scratch/global lists.
